subject: Civic Education

lesson.title: Teacher to arrange learners in pairs to undertaken the following activity:
topics: learners to discuss how decisions are made at home.
Learners to role play family roles.
activities: learners to discuss how decisions are made at home.
Learners to role play family roles.
The teacher and learners to engage in a question-and-answer session on the role of
children in making a better family.
